title: Boost AI context with hybrid search in Spanner
summary: Google Cloud presented hybrid search capabilities in Spanner that combine full-text and vector search for AI-powered applications. The feature supports retrieval-augmented generation and integrates with Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform for contextual multi-model search.
writeup: This video covers hybrid search in Spanner, which combines full-text and vector search within a single database for AI-powered applications. The capability supports retrieval-augmented generation and integrates with the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform for contextual multi-model search. The relevance: keeping both keyword and semantic retrieval in Spanner lets applications draw richer context for generation without stitching together separate systems.
